name: =?utf-8?Q?Dean?=
subject: Hello again from the Dean Browning for Congress Campaign!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/a4ebd32f979c/hello-again-from-the-dean-browning-for-congress-campaign?e=6800876418)
---
| |
---
| |
#
Dear Friends,

We have a choice to make this election cycle. Do we want a Congressperson who is going to avoid taking a stance on the tough issues and who won’t say what they believe? OR do we want a Congressman Dean Browning who will be a Congressperson for us and who will be clear and transparent about his beliefs and goals. Please donate today and help spread

Dean’s message throughout the PA-7th Congressional District
If Dean’s opponent were to be re- elected, it is almost certain that Nancy Pelosi would remain as Speaker of the House of Representatives which would damage our economy and our nation tremendously.

Friends, we cannot let this happen. We have made too much progress and ushered in too much prosperity under President Trump’s leadership to let Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats continue to try and undo everything. Dean has the winning message and would be a Congressman we could all be proud of. But he will not be able to get that message out without you. Please donate $25, $50 or $100 today and let’s elect a Congressman for us – Dean Browning.

Click here to donate!

[https://secure.winred.com/DeanBrowning/donate](https://browningfrocongress.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=69dc25bfa90bd52cf57d45ea0&id=13d61665a5&e=6800876418)

Kelly Tain,
General Consultant

body:
I'm pumped that dozens of people show up to canvasses every week, but there are still some big needs that you can help with. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/98e130461045/re-about-our-volunteers?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=ecf13e781d&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | ,
**More than 500 people have signed up to volunteer for our campaign, because they believe in the movement we are building.** Over 150 people have shown up to canvasses these past three months. It is a great sign for a first-time candidate to have this amount of grassroots support right from the start, and I cannot express how energized this makes me feel.
---
| [Contribute](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=a7dfe99703&e=c169cb0a8e "Contribute")
---
|
---
A group of volunteers preparing to canvass.
| The folks volunteering know that the only way we can defeat the billionaires and win a society that works for all of us is to build a mass movement with the power to win. **But things like door hangers and campaign mailers are crucial to getting our message out, and they cost a lot of money!** Our volunteers are priceless, and we don’t want to let them down by not fundraising enough to win this election.
---
| [Contribute](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=775c19aecd&e=c169cb0a8e "Contribute")
---
| **We are in this fight for the working class.** Please contribute today to keep this campaign strong before the primary.

In solidarity,

Heidi Sloan

| | **This campaign is catching fire. ** The grassroots support these past few days has been electrifying. **Around 20,000 donations have poured over the last 72 hours, catapulting us past the DNC 's 200,000 donor requirement for this month's debate. ** [Some people want to count me out. But I'm fighting for you. Fight with me. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88d/3eb3e2fc/68f26ce0/744d011e/585724293/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+Some+people+want+to+count+me+out+But+Im+&utm_campaign=20191205_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191205_em_fr_b3_castro_all") **DNC REQUIREMENTS: ** **✅ 200,000 unique donors

Chip in immediately to help us boost our efforts. >>**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88d/3eb3e2fc/68f26ce0/744d011d/585724293/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+Now+that+wersquove+hit+the+donor+require&utm_campaign=20191205_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191205_em_fr_b3_castro_all") The support for this campaign over the last 72 hours shows this race is changing dramatically. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Jay Inslee
subject: The freeze is coming.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7923?t=3&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9) Friend, We're a little more than a week out from our biggest hurdle yet as a campaign: The legislative session fundraising freeze. **In a second, I'll ask you for a donation because this is huge -- but first, let me explain why.** For 30 days leading up to the Washington state legislative session and for every day the legislature is in session, I can't raise any money. At all. _Period_. My opponents on the other hand don't have to stop fundraising -- and they will seize this opportunity to rake in as much money as possible while I'm hard at work governing, trust me. **We set an aggressive deadline goal that will fuel us through this big freeze: $50,000.** [**Every dollar makes a difference because we're truly powered by grassroots donations like yours: Will you donate $1 or more today before our freeze deadline next Friday?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7923?t=4&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7924?t=5&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7925?t=6&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7926?t=7&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7927?t=8&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7928?t=9&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7929?t=10&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---
I'm up against at least six opponents who want to take my job in next year's election -- and the Republican Governors Association has plenty of cash to burn to help them do it.
Remember: In the first six months of 2019 alone, the RGA raised $30 million dollars. During the 2018 cycle, they raised $180 million. They've got money to spend, and beating me would be a HUGE upset -- exactly what they're looking for. We cannot take any chances here: We've made incredible progress this year, from free or reduced college tuition, to a statewide public healthcare option, to taking steps to dramatically reduce our carbon footprint.
Our successes are being used as models for states across the country -- and could be adopted at the national level if we keep fighting and building on that progress. But if I lose next year's election, _everything_ gets rolled back.
**We can't let that happen -- and the freeze could really stall our momentum.** [**That's why we set an aggressive $50,000 fundraising goal to hit by next Friday's deadline: Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7923?t=11&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/7923?t=12&akid=8002%2E868730%2E8gerS9)
---

name: Andrew Yang
subject: We must make December our strongest fundraising month in the history of this campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4182%2E377263%2EJ0tKKf) Yang Gang --

I want to be as honest with you as I can about what’s at stake in December.

**The good news:** We are running a strong organizing program across every early state -- and our ad program in Iowa and New Hampshire is only ramping up.

**What’s keeping the pressure on:** The debate qualification period for December ends on the 12th and we have yet to get our final poll. AND our end-of-quarter deadline hits at midnight ET on December 31 -- that means our fundraising goes public for the world to see.

**What other campaigns are doing:** We’re seeing increased ads on the airwaves in Iowa and New Hampshire -- that both raises the prices of our ads and makes it harder to break through.

**What you can do to help:** We must make December our strongest fundraising month in the history of this campaign. And we must start now. Ad buys are paid weekly, and the earlier we have resources, the earlier we can add field staff to the early primary state teams.

[Please, give all you can, Yang Gang, to make December the strongest month of fundraising this campaign has ever seen. This is how we rise in the polls and show everyone the strength of this campaign. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18834?t=5&akid=4182%2E377263%2EJ0tKKf) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18834?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4182%2E377263%2EJ0tKKf)

This is our moment to make history,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18834?t=6&akid=4182%2E377263%2EJ0tKKf)

name: Gov. Roy Cooper
subject: reaching out to you directly
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team - Today, I officially filed my re-election paperwork for North Carolina governor!

It seems like it was just yesterday that I announced my first campaign. I knew then that it would be an uphill battle, and this time is no different. **North Carolina will be in the spotlight in 2020 up and down the ballot - and my race will be the most competitive and expensive gubernatorial races in the country.**
**[_The DGA said I could reach out to you directly to ask for your support for my campaign and the DGA today. Can you chip in $__1_ _ to help us meet our $10,000 goal before midnight? Your gift will be matched._](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY2NzczMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
| | | [Donate $1 (becomes $2)](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY2NzczMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Donate $5 (becomes $10)](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MTY2NzczMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Donate $25 (becomes $50)](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY2NzczMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| | [Donate another amount](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MTY2NzczMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Republicans want to flip our blue state red because they don't support the progress we've made. As governor, I've fought tooth and nail to better the lives of North Carolina families - pushing back against extreme partisan gerrymandering and bad Republican budgets that value corporate tax cuts over expanding Medicaid. I vetoed extreme right-wing legislation that's wrong for North Carolina families, our economy, and our environment.

**And I 'll keep fighting - but I need you to stand with me.** The attacks from our opponents and wealthy special interests are just beginning, so if we're going to be prepared for the fight ahead, we must build the resources to get our message directly to voters.

That's where you come in, Team. **[Will you pitch in with a gift of $1, to be split between my campaign and the DGA, have it matched, and help us raise $10,000 by midnight tonight to defeat Republicans in North Carolina and across the country?](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MTY2NzczMTkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you for taking action.

Roy Cooper
Governor of North Carolina

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the DGA email list, [click here](https://www.pages02.net/democraticgovernorsassoc/unsubscribe/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=16677319&spUserID=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&spJobID=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2&spReportId=MTc4MDM1Nzc0NAS2). | | Paid for by Democratic Governors Association.
---
Contributions or gifts to the Democratic Governors Association are not tax deductible.

From: **Team Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Thu, Dec 5, 2019
Subject: Is your phone close?
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

A typical presidential candidate spends hours and hours a week doing "call time" -- also known as calling wealthy donors and asking for money.

Not Elizabeth. She doesn't spend any of her time courting wealthy donors to fund her campaign. Instead, she values the time she spends talking with supporters from across the country at town halls.

**And today she's doing her own style of "call time" -- thanking a few of the grassroots donors who give what they can to this email, whether it's $5, $10, or $50.**

[**She might even give you a call. Chip in anything you can right now, and keep your phone close by today. Elizabeth might give you a call to say thanks!**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b735/45c30650/11c8a028b/66f87f42/535140832/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTI0Rl9FR1JfS0lDX1BfMjAxOTEyMDVfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM24F_EGR_KIC_P_20191205_V1S2_P")

name: info@michaelbennet.com
subject: before you go to sleep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Friends -

New research out today shows that Michael performs better than frontrunners Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren in appealing to the voters Democrats will need to beat Donald Trump in 2020.

"America in One Room," which was organized by Stanford's Center for Deliberative Democracy, gathered a national sample of more than 500 registered voters in Texas to hear from some of the candidates. Here's what they found:

---
| [Bennet finished with the strongest cross-party support:

73% approval among Democrats, 57% among independents, and a third among Republicans. Bennet also proved to be more appealing to Republicans and independents than any of the frontrunners (Biden, Warren, and Sanders).](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba947/134673f2/9f0d35a/6997bf32/3041613668/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_120519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

| | [CHIP IN TO ELECT MICHAEL BENNET >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba947/134673f2/9f0d35a/6997bf31/3041613668/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_120519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Michael is the only candidate in this race who's won two tough national elections in a purple swing state. He knows how we can win back the 9 million people who voted twice for Obama and once for Trump.

We won't do it with empty promises of free stuff or a billionaire's bank account.

[We will win this race by reaching out to the vast majority of undecided voters who are looking for a unifying vision for our country.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba947/134673f2/9f0d35a/6997bf30/3041613668/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_120519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

This fight is far from over, but our finance team crunched the numbers and we need to ratchet up our fundraising.

[Make a contribution of $29 (or whatever you can afford) today to fuel this campaign to victory! >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba947/134673f2/9f0d35a/6997bf30/3041613668/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-dec?refcode=EM_FR_B2_120519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Steve Chabot
subject: impeachment surprise!
body:
Today’s Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn’t get further to the left, today’s Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide.

No Images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdulujjl-kujkulhluu-a/

Friend,

I’m sure you’ve heard by now, but early this morning, Nancy Pelosi made a surprise announcement that radical Democrats in Washington will move forward with impeaching our president.

Pelosi has taken the left’s impeachment hysteria to a new level, officially recommending that the House introduce articles of impeachment...

Pelosi claims her decision was based on “facts,” but as someone who participated in yesterday’s Judiciary Committee hearing, I can tell you with complete certainty: the Democrats’ arguments are VOID of facts.

I am fighting hard to defend our president and I need you by my side.

The Democrats’ impeachment agenda has officially crossed a line.

By moving to recommend articles of impeachment based on nothing but a desire to undo the results of the 2016 election, Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff are abusing a power reserved in our Constitution for the most serious of crimes.

It’s up to us to send a message loud and clear that we DO NOT SUPPORT their politically-motivated witch hunt, and that WE HAVE PRESIDENT TRUMP’S BACK!

I WILL DEFEND PRESIDENT TRUMP [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_pelosi_announcement_20191205_pelosiannouncement_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1] I DO NOT SUPPORT IMPEACHMENT [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_pelosi_announcement_20191205_pelosiannouncement_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Think about what this means for the future of our country. We can’t allow impeachment to become the go-to weapon to remove someone we dislike from office.

As I said yesterday, President Trump is going to serve out his term and be elected to another one. But to get there, he needs your help to beat this shameful impeachment effort: https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/ [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/stop-impeachment/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_pelosi_announcement_20191205_pelosiannouncement_steve_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Will you join me in defending President Trump?

Steve Chabot

6613 Glenway Ave, Cincinnati, OH 45211 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings. Like https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jdulujjl-kujkulhluu-f/ Tweet https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jdulujjl-kujkulhluu-z/ Forward https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jdulujjl-l-v Preferences https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jdulujjl-961825B2-kujkulhluu-e | Unsubscribe https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jdulujjl-kujkulhluu-s/

name: Christina Finello
subject: Hey, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Morning, Peter,

I just got an update on this week’s fundraising \-- and right now, we’re still behind our goal.

There’s an outside group spending BIG on ads to prop up my opponent incumbent Brian Fitzpatrick by attempting to influence the narrative coming out of the public impeachment hearings.

With our quarterly filing deadline coming up on December 31, it’s critically important that we don’t miss a single benchmark this month for us to have the resources we need to go up against Fitzpatrick and his corporate PAC buddies. Our campaign is entirely funded by individuals \-- mostly from right here in PA-01 \-- who believe Pennsylvania families deserve better than a leader who puts hyper-partisan politics ahead of policies that will improve lives.

We need to bring in $830 more before midnight to finish the first week of December strong. Can I count on you to pitch in $10, $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us close the gap at the link?

Christina

subject: Articles of Impeachment

body:

---
_**PELOSI: "WE WILL IMPEACH"**_
Friend,

**I DID NOTHING WRONG.**

The Do Nothing Democrats had a historically bad day the other day and now Nancy is trying to cover up for it by calling for her minions to proceed with **Articles of Impeachment.**

_They just announced that they are going to seek to IMPEACH me over NOTHING._ This means that beyond the important and seldom used act of IMPEACHMENT, it will be used routinely to ATTACK future Presidents that Party leaders don't agree with.

**This is not what our Founders had in mind.** The Democrats have NO impeachment case and are demeaning our great Country at YOUR expense. But, nothing matters to them - they have gone absolutely insane.

_**TELL ME NANCY: HOW CAN YOU IMPEACH A PRESIDENT THAT DID NOTHING WRONG?**_

Nancy and her corrupt party have proven that there is no line they won't cross to try and _STEAL the 2020 Election._ The biggest WITCH HUNT in the history of politics has reached a critical point, and I need YOU to be on the right side of history with me.
---

It's US against THEM. Make no mistake this is a war, and a war we must win to save the United States of America.

clean_body: | Folks, Big news: Sunrise Movement just endorsed Charles’ movement to defeat Mitch McConnell! Charles is fired up to work with such a dedicated group of young people that’s ready to combat climate change and create new jobs. This is the group that helped make the Green New Deal not just popular, but also a policy that candidates for president are competing to champion. In the words of Evan Weber, political director of Sunrise Movement, “Going into the 2020 elections, we are proud to support a lifelong Kentuckian like Booker, who is committed to building a grassroots movement that tackles the real economic and environmental crises at home.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = Unlike Mitch McConnell, Charles believes in science — and bold, transformative policies like a Green New Deal. Peter --

Last year, we got within inches of defeating Steve King and electing J.D. Scholten to represent Iowa’s 4th District. This time around, we’re hitting the ground running, and we have more momentum than ever before.

And we just got some major news to add to this momentum: **_Inside Elections_ has moved the race for Iowa’s 4th from leans Republican to tilts Republican.**

**[That means political analysts believe J.D. Scholten is running a strong campaign and has a real shot at defeating Steve King and winning this seat -- especially if we keep building on our success. When we started this race, we knew that the climb would be steep, but every day, we are gaining new ground. We’re scoring endorsements we didn’t get last time around, visiting towns that haven’t seen candidates pass through in ages, and already seeing new faces at our town halls.

In 2016, Trump won this district by 27 points. Last year, J.D. came within 3 points of defeating Steve King. **That was our grassroots movement at work, and that’s why we’re working even harder this time around to close the gap and win.**

We’re able to keep this momentum up because of grassroots contributions from people like you. Steve King has been around for so long that he makes little effort to meet people. He’s resting on his laurels and is unwilling to put in the hard work to be the representation that we deserve. We have to hustle: We’re holding town halls in all 39 counties and not taking a single voter for granted.

To keep this up, we need your help. Together, we can defeat Steve King once and for all.

**[Pitch in $5 or more right now to keep our people-powered campaign running strong.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12596912/129732876/-690034814?refcode=em19_191206_RatingsChange2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNDkzNTY2ZS01ZDE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hJuaMtUenlsdE85SRSMRjrgj8di6qeG9xeqCp1bSUMM=)**

Thanks for standing tall with us.

\-- Team Scholten

Together, we can defeat Steve King once and for all. = Thanks for standing tall with us. \-- Team Scholten =

name: Gov. Gavin Newsom
subject: need your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
| | |
---
Team -

I'm proud to say California has made serious progress fighting climate change this year.
Unfortunately, at every turn, the Trump administration has attempted to block that progress. They have gutted environmental protections and denied climate science - all to line the pockets of Big Oil.
In his latest attack on the planet, Trump rolled back federal greenhouse gas standards - and even revoked CA's authority to regulate auto emissions. If the president thinks he can stop the states from taking action on climate change, he is dead wrong.
We need to make sure that Democrats can stand up for our environment and curb the effects of climate change - we're even suing Trump to make sure he hears us loud and clear.**But if we 're going to prevent a climate catastrophe, we need to know where our grassroots supporters stand.** The DGA's climate poll is closing at 11:59 p.m. tonight, and we still need your response:
| | **TELL US BEFORE 11:59 P.M.**
---
**Should Democrats fight climate change?**
---
| | | [YES](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTY2NzcyNjQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1NjEzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
| [NO](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY2NzcyNjQS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1NjEzMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Thanks for pushing back,

Gavin Newsom
Governor of CA
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

---

name: Mike Thompson
subject: historic
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Peter,

2019 has been an historic year. Since the 116th Congress was sworn into office in January, my Democratic colleagues in the House and I have accomplished a lot.

[**_Please add your name to show your support for the progress House Democrats have made this year._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/--eW_3pVhoL32ENMOZtUKPdokowP4OE7JDtupXd2uks=/c6o-0z7dWRAM67sNCgxZDRUi2JLgIS4Ql67Wa0Ai5WI=)

**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/--eW_3pVhoL32ENMOZtUKPdokowP4OE7JDtupXd2uks=/c6o-0z7dWRAM67sNCgxZDRUi2JLgIS4Ql67Wa0Ai5WI=)**
From our very first bill expanding voting rights and safeguarding our democracy, to protecting Dreamers, to passing sweeping gun violence prevention legislation -- we have been hard at work fighting for the American people.

[**_Please sign on to show your support for all that we 've accomplished together._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/--eW_3pVhoL32ENMOZtUKPdokowP4OE7JDtupXd2uks=/c6o-0z7dWRAM67sNCgxZDRUi2JLgIS4Ql67Wa0Ai5WI=)

We must continue to do what the American people sent us to Washington to do -- fight for reforms and restore the public's faith in our government.

Thanks,

Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/--eW_3pVhoL32ENMOZtUKPdokowP4OE7JDtupXd2uks=/z0ezYUHkX-wGhw7o796c2DddFqcQlfOqAXbtBICb4kE=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/--eW_3pVhoL32ENMOZtUKPdokowP4OE7JDtupXd2uks=/_UDNtBe-SqSdLEvXROCv0rqDrubzB0TVgXAhzHA-zBQ=?amount=25&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_90DO_191112_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

_We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,[_**click here.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/--eW_3pVhoL32ENMOZtUKPdokowP4OE7JDtupXd2uks=/ic1eJjKrMoI-Vm53tTblOPNvcFCJdf92bzshN7zyfpU=)_

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88e/3eb3e2fc/68f786e9/744d007c/2487469709/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88e/3eb3e2fc/68f786e9/744d007b/2487469709/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc88e/3eb3e2fc/68f786e9/744d007a/2487469709/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: Unite the Country
subject: Our new ad is hitting the airwaves (watch!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
Today we are releasing our first TV ad supporting Joe Biden's candidacy for president!
The new ad, called "Courage," highlights Joe's record of doing the right thing, even if it wasn't always popular. On issues like taking on the NRA and passing an assault weapons ban, addressing violence against women, and standing up for marriage equality, Joe has consistently led the effort to make Americans' lives better.
**Watch our new ad, then please share it with your friends.**

name: Congressman Al Green
subject: If not now, when? If not us, who?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/FRMTxrUDNwIIrq6u0pZvX-6jlBU8IUCiOjbSCZ6A_bk=/e2eRCOj0h4Pn1h9TXL4XgEntf6KQoKX-BiyVG7ZLPBE=)
---
Friends, This week, the House Judiciary Committee held its first hearing to discuss the constitutional threshold for impeachment and whether the President's behavior meets that standard. Of the four legal scholars called to testify in front of the Committee, not one was a person of color. Many of the most accomplished, erudite, and forward-thinking scholars of our time are people of color. To challenge President Trump -- who has repeatedly incited violence against minority communities -- without the input or expertise of a single member of those communities is simply shameful. I first called to impeach President Donald Trump over two years ago for his hateful and incitive remarks against people of color, Muslim-Americans, Jewish-Americans, the LGBTQ+ community, and other disadvantaged and underrepresented groups. Though I am proud and grateful that my colleagues in Congress have joined me in the call, it is not enough to indict the President without including these charges. For Congress to ignore the President's stoking of white supremacy and choose only to hold him accountable for his actions regarding Ukraine is a clear sign to those communities that their pain is not enough to prompt action. We are at a crossroads in our nation's history, and our actions will be remembered for years. It is our responsibility to use this moment to advance liberty and justice for **_ALL_**. I pray that the hands of history will record that when we were confronted with President Trump's abuse of power via racism, anti-Semitism, Islamophobia, xenophobia, and transphobia, we did the right thing and impeached him for it. In solidarity, Congressman Al Green | **[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/FRMTxrUDNwIIrq6u0pZvX-6jlBU8IUCiOjbSCZ6A_bk=/M1NFDzfs5sjmAnlOj5ykzpkUwf80o4yFin77qVvVOlE=?recurring=auto&amount=25&refcode=1206-impeachment)**
---

Keep Al Green in Congress
P.O. Box 56761
Houston TX 77256-6761 United States | Paid for and Authorized by Keep Al Green in Congress
---
[unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/FRMTxrUDNwIIrq6u0pZvX-6jlBU8IUCiOjbSCZ6A_bk=/rV34EhEMvS0dUYecCP0_4z5V-0d5wQNSf18AwCojAbg=)

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Voter suppression is nothing new, but the GOP sure is good at it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hey Peter, With an FEC that's not functioning and a Congress that's deadlocked on passing election reform, the GOP is delightfully taking every opportunity to disenfranchise voters. In Texas, the GOP-controlled state legislature passed a law that shuttered early polling stations at campuses across the state, early polling stations where tens of thousands of ballots have been cast in past elections. In Florida, Republicans are trying to subvert a voter-approved ballot measure giving ex-felons the right to vote. And in Georgia, the Republican Secretary of State announced plans to purge 330,000 MORE voters from their records \-- the same state that Stacey Abrams lost the gubernatorial election by less than 2% of the vote. If we're going to have a fair chance at taking back the Senate and the White House, everyone who is eligible to vote needs the chance to \-- and we HAVE to stop the GOP from cheating. When Democrats Turn Out is committed to ensuring that everyone can vote, but we need to hear from you on this critical issue: **Are you concerned about Republicans suppressing the 2020 vote?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb2/6e9863e8/16e87a0b/1db0b822/871177619/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/IjgpugLx") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb2/6e9863e8/16e87a0b/1db0b822/871177619/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/IjgpugLx") Thanks for your support. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb2/6e9863e8/16e87a0b/1db0b827/871177619/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191206a.ND&refcode2=JmpYOXQg7rwLy4X0NcLC")

name: Dan Lipinski
subject: 400 bills!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LIPINSKI FOR CONGRESS [Click here to unsubscribe from Dan's email list
body:
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12600970/129771057/368741054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU0ZTU0MC02ZTE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX1zUtQ6l_lImtGMR6iclFJuTGstDB2UNvQnGt1k6eM=&emci=9273733a-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4a54e540-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)

| | | | Friend —

Since the start of 2019, the House has passed over 400 BILLS.

But, only 70 of those bills have passed the Senate and become law. It’s simple: we need more bipartisanship.

**_I’m fed up with the gridlock in Washington._** That is why I am gathering 2,000 grassroots signatures from my supporters in the next 24 hours to send a message that we’re committed to finding commonsense solutions in Washington.

**[If you are fed up with gridlock in Washington and believe that we need bipartisan, commonsense solutions, then sign my petition today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12600971/129771058/-1529075014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU0ZTU0MC02ZTE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX1zUtQ6l_lImtGMR6iclFJuTGstDB2UNvQnGt1k6eM=&emci=9273733a-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4a54e540-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**
****[Add your name here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12600972/129771059/-1529075014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU0ZTU0MC02ZTE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX1zUtQ6l_lImtGMR6iclFJuTGstDB2UNvQnGt1k6eM=&emci=9273733a-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4a54e540-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)****
I’m part of the coalition in the House that’s voted to lower prescription drug costs among other bills. But Congress must come together and continue to find commonsense solutions to the problems plaguing our country.

The American people deserve better than a gridlocked Congress. If you agree with me, **[then please sign our petition today demanding that Congress act on behalf of the American people.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12600973/129771060/-1529075014?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTU0ZTU0MC02ZTE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX1zUtQ6l_lImtGMR6iclFJuTGstDB2UNvQnGt1k6eM=&emci=9273733a-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=4a54e540-6e18-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=2478574)**

Thank you for standing with me,

Dan

name: Team Yang
subject: We’ve got a new strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
It involves meeting Every. Single. Iowan.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8) Yang Gang --

As we approach the Iowa caucuses, more and more candidates are filling the airwaves with ads. Ads are important, but they’re not a substitute for in-person conversations with voters.

**So we’ve got a strategy to win over Iowa voters:** Andrew is kicking off a bus tour across Iowa this week. From Des Moines to Davenport, and Ames to Iowa City, we’re going to make sure that Every. Single. Iowan. gets the chance to meet our candidate.

**[While Andrew is in Iowa, we want to send a message to the press and everyone watching across the country. That’s why we’ve launched a $2 million goal by the end of the tour on December 15th. Can you chip in to help us reach it?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=5&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=13&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=12&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=8&amount=25&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---
Yang Gang, statewide tours are extremely expensive -- we’re paying for organizers, advance staff, event space, security, and more.

This is on top of our staff, offices, and ads we’re running across the state.

It’s not going to be easy, but the Yang Gang has hit every single goal we’ve set so far. So let’s make it happen again and then celebrate together at the close of the tour on December 15th.

**[Chip in $10 or more now. Hitting this goal -- or falling short -- will send a BIG message about our ability to compete in this caucus.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=7&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)**

Thanks for coming along with us on this journey to put Humanity First,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Chip in](https://act.yang2020.com/go/18842?t=6&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=4217%2E377263%2E-EPZP8) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Theresa Greenfield
subject: Maggie said I could write you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
My name is Theresa Greenfield, and I'm a mom, a farm kid, and Democrat running to flip a red Senate seat blue in Iowa. I'm ready to fight for hard-working Americans. This race is shaping up to be one of the most important -- and expensive -- in the country.
We only need to flip 4 seats to take back control of the Senate, and that starts right here in Iowa. This team helped Maggie win by just over a thousand votes in 2016 and flip a crucial Senate seat. Now I'm asking for your help.
[**We're building a people-powered campaign, and we're relying on folks just like you to help us win. Pitch in $3 -- or whatever you can -- today to help us take back this seat and flip the Senate.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc300/2a380d31/3d0cc552/f0e5ba/3772688982/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3JlZW5maWVsZCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMjA2X213aDR0Z182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4greenfield?refcode=e20191206_mwh4tg_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
I believe it doesn't matter where you come from or what your economic standing is: if you work hard, you should be able to get ahead in this country. But McConnell has made it clear he's not fighting for hard-working Americans -- he's fighting for the giant corporate special interests.
That's why when I'm in the U.S. Senate, I'll work with Maggie to invest in our education system, support small businesses, and bring down health care costs -- to give everybody an equal chance to succeed. [**Will you join my team by pitching in $ or whatever you can right away? Every dollar helps us get one step closer to winning.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc300/2a380d31/3d0cc552/f0e5ba/3772688982/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3JlZW5maWVsZCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMjA2X213aDR0Z182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4greenfield?refcode=e20191206_mwh4tg_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")
Thank you,
Theresa Greenfield
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc300/2a380d31/3d0cc552/f0e5ba/3772688982/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Z3JlZW5maWVsZCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTkxMjA2X213aDR0Z182bW8iLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4greenfield?refcode=e20191206_mwh4tg_6mo&amounts=3,25,50,100,250&recurring=auto")

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Cruel
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
As someone who grew up on food stamps, I know that without this critical government program, my life would have turned out very differently. It would have meant fewer meals on the table growing up and more difficulty focusing in class. | | | [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2xb/67lzP7EWRUy2xDEVtMZ8Yg/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwE-2Flvb1IfCIdhh4rj-2Bhz1uO0RTKKgU34a3HDZ6foYgsA4npCEBV3ooJ5vubatYcAr2tK9-2FqkZ8YBDCIpUfDRoNk5m8Hx9fD8Nb-2Bw5cEjElb3dS-2FbYrasOsP21HZ2AQ7UL3oqblQmQwtk5aWl8L6xUPtcbaUbRgh6cPAWSZQrxF4yJyzXZuRWn9mN9UW8RYVpk4vpw5RAqmD0qwrCb1IrlOs5BBuslqiWYj1rlL-2BF65AM-3D/FVBa)
Hi Friend, **** I just heard that the Trump administration is cutting food stamps for 700,000 people in the United States. **It’s messed up.** As someone who grew up on food stamps, I know that without this critical government program, my life would have turned out very differently. It would have meant fewer meals on the table growing up and more difficulty focusing in class. Without food stamps, I probably wouldn’t have been able to make it to where I am today, fully chasing my dreams. I also know that my mom worked multiple jobs just to be able to provide for our family. She fought to make ends meet — _and we still needed help._ That’s a reality for many of the families who are about to be devastated by Trump’s latest, cruel budget cuts. **** ****[****](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2xb/67lzP7EWRUy2xDEVtMZ8Yg/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwE-2Flvb1IfCIdhh4rj-2Bhz1uO0RTKKgU34a3HDZ6foYgsBacd3tFGSQUP5qTbKo3Vvt217qY1uJpeZWGkM1QVs5pF7PQKKOecgjwbiZc43eB4Zqt-2B9CS75PypRag9QOlB96dIUwWJkkiQ3cPz4UFb9PHxp2oQX8kf6AM9jSmRd4tSYzqMd-2F0FPq9pCGWeTktgPHpDbXm7mC7WufzbELC-2BnOS2HSF-2F9dOS-2FAU-2FiVOcYcnTw-3D/3h4r)**This is why we started this campaign.** We need more leaders who know firsthand how important the policies we create in D.C. are — the very real impact they have, especially on working-class families. **[Will you chip in $5 today to our campaign so I can fight in D.C. for policies that help families, not hurt them?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2xb/67lzP7EWRUy2xDEVtMZ8Yg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwE-2Flvb1IfCIdhh4rj-2Bhz1uO0RTKKgU34a3HDZ6foYgsBKUaCBn9tYw703cATwjGCnBaGv-2B1KFXCG1mV8XFwL6ufRZaWi8o-2FsDRN1P-2BbjVvx4E5RL3u8-2FwxBsFd1-2FwIUpchlSwxgnFKJuEGkWuwL9gK6c42jhKz0fVdUVtM59CAfBegX9fZ903dZxtsS-2BTjKtr18VeWijzRkaqPrgeZbd9IuOkpKhJ4KxcqX1UeW-2Fnkq0-3D/ZUf4)** [Contribute $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2xb/67lzP7EWRUy2xDEVtMZ8Yg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJvIY0UI8PBiux5mOP3HzqwE-2Flvb1IfCIdhh4rj-2Bhz1uGgTPuRNOcKJNKAweaj5p10-2BxzufBK3GHLozAjjjCpoylHI6I4BRwAhCx1UA8Fy-2FHRLfeDRthxIWwIlYW-2BOFeTC1MlAqEy4c2E3-2BRibR5PIgCdWTufny0O2EKrxRqflpTxy2TsDzlHfImqZUl1nqcIDVZUJRgQWUrpvJIUgvm4SdxWauzyb5MiFWpS3hiQ83ozCfBBeb2H55gtXrD3zcvuor4N8EV5XSDe9GpQXmOLfF/t4bZ) **** If you’re wondering why Trump would do such a thing, here’s why: _The cruelty is the point._ Trump’s administration believes that, by instilling fear and reinforcing bigoted stereotypes about people who rely on food stamps, he can score political points and strengthen his hateful agenda. He wants policies like these to make us feel diminished and powerless. **But here’s the thing: we refuse to let him.** Think about how powerful our message would be if the kid who grew up on food stamps got elected to Congress and fought for every other family who faced the same struggles he did.**** **[Will you chip in $5 today to our campaign and help send that clean_body: As someone who grew up on food stamps, I know that without this critical government program, my life would have turned out very differently. It would have meant fewer meals on the table growing up and more difficulty focusing in class. | | | Hi Friend, ** I just heard that the Trump administration is cutting food stamps for 700,000 people in the United States. It’s messed up. As someone who grew up on food stamps, I know that without this critical government program, my life would have turned out very differently. It would have meant fewer meals on the table growing up and more difficulty focusing in class. Without food stamps, I probably wouldn’t have been able to make it to where I am today, fully chasing my dreams. I also know that my mom worked multiple jobs just to be able to provide for our family. She fought to make ends meet — and we still needed help. That’s a reality for many of the families who are about to be devastated by Trump’s latest, cruel budget cuts. is why we started this campaign. We need more leaders who know firsthand how important the policies we create in D.C. are — the very real impact they have, especially on working-class families. If you’re wondering why Trump would do such a thing, here’s why: The cruelty is the point. Trump’s administration believes that, by instilling fear and reinforcing bigoted stereotypes about people who rely on food stamps, he can score political points and strengthen his hateful agenda. He wants policies like these to make us feel diminished and powerless. But here’s the thing: we refuse to let him. Think about how powerful our message would be if the kid who grew up on food stamps got elected to Congress and fought for every other family who faced the same struggles he did. ** Mondaire | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Our mailing address is: Mondaire for Congress P.O. Box 933, Nyack, NY 10960 | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Mondaire for Congress, please .

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: we have a long road ahead of us, and I’m glad you’re on my team
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/69606/images/lofgrenlogo2%20%281%29.png]
Friends, it’s hard to believe that we’re in the final month of 2019 and just a few weeks away from an election year.

I wanted to take a moment to let you know how continually grateful I am to have you on my team. Your support allows my campaign to run, helps other California Democrats hold their seats, and keeps our Democratic House majority strong. Thank you.
https://zoelofgren.com/ [https://zoelofgren.com/]
Over the next few months, I’ll be reaching out more frequently with important news and updates. I hope you’re ready to double down and face the year ahead with the knowledge that when we work together, there’s nothing we can’t accomplish.

Thanks again, from the bottom of my heart.

Onward,

Zoe
Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help. Click here to donate to Zoe’s campaign → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zlem?refcode=emfooter&amount=10&recurring=auto] PAID FOR BY LOFGREN FOR CONGRESS

name: Jenny (Finance Director)
subject: It's going to be intense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Trump and his allies in the GOP are mounting a full-on offensive to take Virginia back.
|
---
| | **The GOP is mounting a full-on offensive in Virginia.** **[Donate now to fight back!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d746/53d9897e/53e97a90/1c89f111/3723706157/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepvablue?refcode=20191206_f_1_nd__375__&refcode2=top&amount=5")** Derek,

**First** -- The Trump campaign set up its headquarters in Virginia, signaling that they intend to win our Commonwealth in 2020.

**Then** -- Multiple Republican opponents entered Virginia's Senate race hoping to unseat Mark Warner and turn the Commonwealth red. **One of these candidates voted with Trump 98% of the time when he was in Congress.**

**NOW -- We need to fight back. [Will you donate right now to make sure Mark stays in the Senate and continues working hard for us?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d746/53d9897e/53e97a90/1c89f110/3723706157/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM3NSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-keepvablue?refcode=20191206_f_1_nd__375__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

Trump and his allies in the GOP are mounting a full-on offensive to take Virginia back. If we don't want to see all of our hard-earned progress go down the drain next year, we have to build the strongest campaign we've ever had. Mark will be the only Democrat running a statewide campaign in 2020. We need to be sure that this campaign is strong enough to lift up the Democratic candidates running in communities across Virginia.

We're heading into an _intense_ election year, Derek. **We need your support to make sure Mark has all the resources he needs to successfully win re-election in 2020. Will you chip in now to help Mark build a strong campaign that can beat Donald Trump and his allies and keep Virginia blue?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your name: Aisling Kerins
subject: I need you to read this.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
We could be in real trouble.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8022?t=3&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ) Friend, I wanted to make sure you saw Jay's note and provide a bit more context about what we're up against: Jay's running against six candidates next year -- including Tim Eyman. Tim Eyman is a deeply conservative, anti-tax activist well known for sponsoring right-wing ballot measures in Washington state for nearly 20 years. He's running for money and attention -- sound familiar? I don't need to remind you what happened in 2016 when as a nation we underestimated our opponents and just assumed the most qualified person would win. We cannot sleep on this race because we think it's wrapped up and in the bag: It's not. [**We have an aggressive deadline next week, and we have to stop fundraising for at least three months once we hit it. We need to raise $50,000 before Friday, December 13 -- will you donate $1 or more to chip in?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8022?t=4&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8023?t=5&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8024?t=6&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8025?t=7&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8026?t=8&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8027?t=9&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8028?t=10&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
Thanks,
Aisling
\------ Forwarded message ------
From: Jay Inslee
Date: Thursday, Dec 5, 2019
Subject: The freeze is coming.
We're a little more than a week out from our biggest hurdle yet as a campaign: The legislative session fundraising freeze.
**In a second, I'll ask you for a donation because this is huge -- but first, let me explain why.**
For 30 days leading up to the Washington state legislative session and for every day the legislature is in session, I can't raise any money. At all. _Period_. My opponents on the other hand don't have to stop fundraising -- and they will seize this opportunity to rake in as much money as possible while I'm hard at work governing, trust me.
**We set an aggressive deadline goal that will fuel us through this big freeze: $50,000.** [**Every dollar makes a difference because we're truly powered by grassroots donations like yours: Will you donate $1 or more today before our freeze deadline next Friday?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8022?t=11&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$1 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8023?t=12&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8024?t=13&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8025?t=14&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8026?t=15&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8027?t=16&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8028?t=17&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
---
I'm up against at least six opponents who want to take my job in next year's election -- and the Republican Governors Association has plenty of cash to burn to help them do it.
Remember: In the first six months of 2019 alone, the RGA raised $30 million dollars. During the 2018 cycle, they raised $180 million. They've got money to spend, and beating me would be a HUGE upset -- exactly what they're looking for. We cannot take any chances here: We've made incredible progress this year, from free or reduced college tuition, to a statewide public healthcare option, to taking steps to dramatically reduce our carbon footprint.
Our successes are being used as models for states across the country -- and could be adopted at the national level if we keep fighting and building on that progress. But if I lose next year's election, _everything_ gets rolled back.
**We can't let that happen -- and the freeze could really stall our momentum.** [**That's why we set an aggressive $50,000 fundraising goal to hit by next Friday's deadline: Will you donate $1 or more right now?**](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8022?t=18&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)
Very truly yours,
Jay
[CONTRIBUTE!](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8022?t=19&akid=8003%2E868730%2EReQQNZ)

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

_**PELOSI: "WE WILL IMPEACH"**_
Friend,

**I DID NOTHING WRONG.**

The Do Nothing Democrats had a historically bad day the other day and now Nancy is trying to cover up for it by calling for her minions to proceed with **Articles of Impeachment.**

_They just announced that they are going to seek to IMPEACH me over NOTHING._ This means that beyond the important and seldom used act of IMPEACHMENT, it will be used routinely to ATTACK future Presidents that Party leaders don't agree with.

**This is not what our Founders had in mind.** The Democrats have NO impeachment case and are demeaning our great Country at YOUR expense. But, nothing matters to them - they have gone absolutely insane.

_**TELL ME NANCY: HOW CAN YOU IMPEACH A PRESIDENT THAT DID NOTHING WRONG?**_

Nancy and her corrupt party have proven that there is no line they won't cross to try and _STEAL the 2020 Election._ The biggest WITCH HUNT in the history of politics has reached a critical point, and I need YOU to be on the right side of history with me.

It's US against THEM. Make no mistake this is a war, and a war we must win to save the United States of America.

I'm calling on my **most FIERCE and LOYAL defenders** to step up to the front lines of this Impeachment war and show the Left that we will NEVER stop fighting.

body:
I was just endorsed by Congressman Steve Scalise, Minority Whip in the U.S. House of Representatives. | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=24cddea38d414c32ade7e3811a63cb28&_e=gqUE2LpqYJ2EtOfYzcQtOnXl7siFK7vd1_r9MnH_dunBbaJtnN98iiVL7Y_tTCc2ifRHkzH4gk0H11pLljQHLiGOo3FeivXB9VsKZg1IGh_7QdvIeMQFGt_Qst3643wBgLehpoIAssjcAWzOPW2PBHG02nIzp7KHwNHmwmKFf2p55YZ_MdYx8CJ7jLvQ11OkFA1fvsiEoPQs9c5_Kux2CJuADuPmTgQmM5ZMH4Ye6O1GmGyEf70uy3BvzJTnpaUd6chwZW-mJ6jO5BwHxvEiJv0s5SjBXHXvLxllZ0WI1M-ZgwQ4xzt_L3PS3eOUvXVGaUJWk4HzTvdcwpIlEq7BPxuzdxWJK1jgxIhv2zN5TujH_dX8lXWYCYdZgGa6DN-D--fHferDG1XwNE90CPR6gF0JukGkJvMhUfiHJgX1yp-u-3sz9BoJWmNPufBZK221)

Peter, this is big.

I knew our campaign was getting national attention, but I had no idea this was coming.

**I was just endorsed by Congressman Steve Scalise, Republican Whip in the U.S. House of Representatives.**

Here’s what he had to say:
_“I am excited to endorse my friend Claudia Tenney for Congress in 2020. Having had the privilege of working alongside Claudia last cycle, I witnessed just how much she genuinely cares for the people of NY-22. This district is her home; it’s where she spent her life, raised her Marine son as a single mom, and I know she’ll go to bat for each and every one of her constituents as their Congresswoman. Claudia has been a tireless advocate for families, veterans, farmers, and small business owners. Now, more than ever, Upstate New York needs a fighter like Claudia back in Congress, that is why I am proud to endorse her.” - House Republican Whip Steve Scalise_
[ **JOIN THE TEAM** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=24cddea38d414c32ade7e3811a63cb28&_e=gqUE2LpqYJ2EtOfYzcQtOnXl7siFK7vd1_r9MnH_dunBbaJtnN98iiVL7Y_tTCc2ifRHkzH4gk0H11pLljQHLiGOo3FeivXB9VsKZg1IGh_7QdvIeMQFGt_Qst3643wBgLehpoIAssjcAWzOPW2PBHG02nIzp7KHwNHmwmKFf2p55YZ_MdYx8CJ7jLvQ11OkFA1fvsiEoPQs9c5_Kux2CJuADuPmTgQmM5ZMH4Ye6O1jGkOL7qruRRpqODz5tYBhxyp60GvtrFej2t3YCXwRGY_Wc4hepKhWvsreE00Vv_4dgS_wsgma0tUmEtmHATLikEQzIztEmhnGhDlt_4bkpnaQSW2NzpCTf8RN95OBiYR_SEpXxWiM1TFXY9SoHLKY32VlY8zVML8rIbyI8YyvSEhwlMT0A7Fm7xxgOYAIjuIPu22mQ7QiYIN2iH3t383Z)
Anthony Brindisi is busy in Washington, carrying on this impeachment media circus while Upstate New Yorkers face higher taxes, rising healthcare costs, and more expensive cable bills.

Peter, Anthony and the do-nothing Democrats are more interested in the distraction of impeachment than delivering real results for our community. Meanwhile, Republicans like Steve Scalise are working tirelessly to expose these hearings for what they are: a SHAM.

**Upstate New Yorkers deserve better than Anthony Brindisi. Will you join my team so I can fight for you in Congress alongside Steve Scalise?**
[ **JOIN THE TEAM** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=24cddea38d414c32ade7e3811a63cb28&_e=gqUE2LpqYJ2EtOfYzcQtOnXl7siFK7vd1_r9MnH_dunBbaJtnN98iiVL7Y_tTCc2ifRHkzH4gk0H11pLljQHLiGOo3FeivXB9VsKZg1IGh_7QdvIeMQFGt_Qst3643wBgLehpoIAssjcAWzOPW2PBHG02nIzp7KHwNHmwmKFf2p55YZ_MdYx8CJ7jLvQ11OkFA1fvsiEoPQs9c5_Kux2CJuADuPmTgQmM5ZMH4Ye6O1wMYAh5eL_OdOMCf_Fsovsc-Hh6joJ3AmwvgKLb9XP0zF4eo4bTrqjALZ0shwXZzSvJBMWJ7pvbI3uVB4sI1GuodOJfTu9u0rsE3DtPTjqp7o6Wk_f0dSzdful13xekrgklOMsR-uFIU1rCbEAU3lrg7JORjJ67zIsmIoYhpuwKWYLkD_YT1BAwV1ADEvL3WZV0sFCuT1J07vnGPGlcWtr)
When I’m in Congress, I won’t bend to the will of Washington liberals or out-of-state donors. My one priority will be delivering results for the people of Upstate New York. **[Join my team to help me get there.](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=24cddea38d414c32ade7e3811a63cb28&_e=gqUE2LpqYJ2EtOfYzcQtOnXl7siFK7vd1_r9MnH_dunBbaJtnN98iiVL7Y_tTCc2ifRHkzH4gk0H11pLljQHLiGOo3FeivXB9VsKZg1IGh_7QdvIeMQFGt_Qst3643wBgLehpoIAssjcAWzOPW2PBHG02nIzp7KHwNHmwmKFf2p55YZ_MdYx8CJ7jLvQ11OkFA1fvsiEoPQs9c5_Kux2CJuADuPmTgQmM5ZMH4Ye6O1RqDOAAzQDjlSv3TqRqXCKStEAjNj_f8rFbkDPXG7C_F0NGSUWQZsxSa5Z31C6ftVIBENlIvRHQf9ct6vgMzMwArcS_Y7lMJ2HWhYofPRRP8PV3aSzbXXZYlxf_9pNij7G9MXk6RejzsEr8K1kvAMEbDLbWUnCjRz4Habkc4nqCQV22mB4MLmLxt8HdFRCqwGnn_inkrImJftEloEMwUrE)**

Claudia Tenney

Will you join my team so I can fight for you in Congress alongside Steve Scalise? When I’m in Congress, I won’t bend to the will of Washington liberals or out-of-state donors. My one priority will be delivering results for the people of Upstate New York. Thanks for your support, Claudia Tenney | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: BREAKING: Trump Working-Class Boom Smashes Expectations!
body:
We just had to email you about this. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6443199e77&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 6, 2019
---
| | | We just had to email you about this.

The contrast is incredible. Despite House Democrats holding Congress captive with their endless investigations, impeachment stunts, and obstruction, President Trump is delivering on his biggest promise to our citizens—restoring the American Dream in every corner of our great country!

Once again, the Trump Economy absolutely smashed “expert” predictions with today’s Jobs Report:
* The unemployment rate fell to 3.5%—matching its lowest level in **50 years.**

* Economists had expected the economy to add 185,000 jobs. It added **266,000**.

* Economists had predicted 15,000 more manufacturing jobs. We got **54,000**.

* Compared with last year, average hourly wages are **up more than 3%. **

* The number of Americans working rose to 158,593,000—**a record high**.

Here’s the [full update](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6cf5b77f0e&e=3ee4985eea "https://www.whitehouse.gov/articles/november-job-gains-smash-expectations/?utm_source=ods&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=special") from the Council of Economic Advisers, but one paragraph in particular tells you everything you need to know about the **blue-collar, middle-class Trump Boom: **
| | _From [the end of the Great Recession] to the end of 2016, average wage growth for production and nonsupervisory workers lagged that of managers, the bottom 10 percent of wage earners lagged that of the top 10 percent, those without a college degree lagged that of college graduates, and African Americans lagged that of white Americans._Since President Trump took office, each of these trends has been reversed, contributing to lower income inequality.__ |
---|---|---

How’s that for Morning in America?
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13870be68d&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c514b4edee&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=27e0c4c14c)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Debbie Stabenow
subject: here we go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
I know how hard this race is.
| |
---
Friends,

Last year, the GOP spent _millions_ trying to defeat me in Michigan and elect John James.
**I've said it before, and I'll say it again:_John James is wrong for Michigan_****.** But with Donald Trump on the ballot this year, they'll fight harder - and spend more than ever - to elect the man who supports Trump's agenda "2,000%".

It's already happening: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have funneled $3 million to help John James defeat my friend, Gary Peters.

I have a front-row seat to the destruction Mitch McConnell is causing in the Senate. **So right now, it has never been more important for Democrats to win back the Senate majority.** Because everything, from our democracy to the future of the Supreme Court, is at stake.

That's why this latest news has me so worried: **Recent polling shows this race is tied. And if Gary loses in Michigan, Democrats have ZERO chance at taking back the Senate in 2020.**
Gary's race will decide who controls the Senate, so we've set a goal to raise another $7,000 by midnight tonight. **But with just hours left, we're only 78% of the way there. In a race this close, with the future of the Senate and the Supreme Court on the line, falling short simply will not get it done**.
**Friends - every dollar could make the difference between winning and losing: [Please, will you rush $3 now to win in Michigan, reelect Gary and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc4/3319210466/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNTMtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk153-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**
Take it from me - I know how important this race is for Michigan's future. Thank you for coming through.
Debbie Stabenow
U.S. Senator, Michigan
| [To unsubscribe from the Peters for Michigan email list, please click here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc3/3319210466/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc2/3319210466/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com | Change or update your email address [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc1/3319210466/VEsC/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/update-your-info") We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc0/3319210466/VEsD/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you would like to unsubscribe from our emails, click [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc3/3319210466/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") [Donate to Gary ->](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daaa6/5721a3ed/71a82149/efaadc2/3319210466/VEsB/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer") |

name: Caitlin, TULSI 2020
subject: Fundraising update:
body:
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12604962/129819101/1624370312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmMyYmU4Mi04NzE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTWer6OXi7HGY4BmxB4efHUFmT5apZ7-HbNHSqOb8hY=&emci=35ad327c-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9bc2be82-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311)
---
| I’m writing today, asking for a moment more of your time than usual. Right now — just weeks out from the end of the year, and one month out from Iowa — it’s more important than ever that **we’re all on the same page about the critical next steps of this campaign, and understand exactly what it’ll take to make history together.**[Here’s how you can help:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12604963/129819102/-659882494?sourceid=1014165&ms=em191206&utm_source=newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=em191206&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmMyYmU4Mi04NzE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTWer6OXi7HGY4BmxB4efHUFmT5apZ7-HbNHSqOb8hY=&emci=35ad327c-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=9bc2be82-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=661311) Friend— We’re just weeks away from the end of the year, and the close of the last FEC deadline for the year. Our movement is making great strides, gaining momentum every day — but we must do more if we’re going to enter the primaries ready to win. Emails like this one you’re reading right now, and the individuals like you who give to them, are the engine of our campaign. We are 100% reliant on generous, hard earned, individual grassroots donations. **And that’s how it should be. Our campaign depends on the will of people because it is We, the People who Tulsi is running to serve.** Now we’re all clear on who really keeps this campaign running (reminder: it’s you), let’s get clear on what we need to do over the coming weeks: **Below are the three most important things we can achieve together before the year is out to ensure Tulsi is in the strongest position possible to keep fighting for all of us, and for a more United States of America:** **What it’ll take to bypass the corporate media blackouts and smears, and keep Tulsi’s message for the people front and center:** Speaking truth to power to millions of viewers every month — on the airwaves, on debate stages, online. We’ve qualified for the 200,000 individual donor threshold for the December debate. But it’s not enough to just be on that stage one night a month, we need to make sure Tulsi’s message is heard every day — with a big digital ad spend that delivers Tulsi’s message to phones and screens across the country. [**We need to raise $1,000,000 by the end of the year so we’re ready to launch powerful digital and TV ads in early states like New Hampshire. Will you donate $37 now to give Tulsi the platform she needs to go head-to-head with establishment picks and the corporate media?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12604964/129819103/-930794029?refcode=em191206-amplify-ask&refcode2=9bc2be82-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&amount=37&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmMyYmU4Mi04NzE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTWer6OXi7HGY4BmxB4efHUFmT5apZ7-HbNHSqOb8hY=) We’ve already seen how the media cannot be relied upon to accurately represent Tulsi, her message or our movement. That means we need to keep finding ways to get around the establishment spin and broadcast it ourselves. **What it’ll take to get Tulsi on the ballot in every state.** In order to win, we need to get Tulsi on the ballot in every single state over the coming weeks and months. The process varies state-by-state with some requiring signatures and many requiring significant investments of time and money. **Bottom line: No name on the ballot, no vote during the primaries, no win. This is a MASSIVE and expensive undertaking.** We have volunteer organizers in more than 13 states collecting signatures each day **but if we’re going to make it, we will need to spend somewhere between $400,000 and $1 million across 39 states to ensure Tulsi’s name is on those ballots as each deadline approaches.** [**Will you chip-in $20 now to our Ballot Access Victory Fund?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12604965/129819104/-1283070033?refcode=em191206-ballot-ask&refcode2=9bc2be82-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmMyYmU4Mi04NzE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTWer6OXi7HGY4BmxB4efHUFmT5apZ7-HbNHSqOb8hY=) **What it’ll take to get Tulsi directly in front of the voters who will decide the next election.** We already know that when Tulsi gets in front of people, she wins them over. **So we need to get Tulsi directly in front of more voters than ever over the coming weeks.** That means town halls and events in early states and more yard signs and billboards in strategic areas around the country that are capable of reaching undecided voters who will decide this next election. [**We need to raise $1 million by the end of the year — and the close of this critical last FEC deadline quarter — in order to make sure our early state organizing and visibility is bigger and louder than ever. Can you help?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/12604966/129819105/-930794029?refcode=em191206-amplify-ask&refcode2=9bc2be82-8718-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS83MjQxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmMyYmU4Mi04NzE4LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aTWer6OXi7HGY4BmxB4efHUFmT5apZ7-HbNHSqOb8hY=) OK! **Are you still with me, friend?** This ambitious yet achievable undertaking is only possible because of the groundswell of grassroots support we’re seeing grow stronger and stronger every day.
