clean_body: | | | | I’m writing today, asking for a moment more of your time than usual. Right now — just weeks out from the end of the year, and one month out from Iowa — it’s more important than ever that we’re all on the same page about the critical next steps of this campaign, and understand exactly what it’ll take to make history together. Friend— We’re just weeks away from the end of the year, and the close of the last FEC deadline for the year. Our movement is making great strides, gaining momentum every day — but we must do more if we’re going to enter the primaries ready to win. Emails like this one you’re reading right now, and the individuals like you who give to them, are the engine of our campaign. We are 100% reliant on generous, hard earned, individual grassroots donations. And that’s how it should be. Our campaign depends on the will of people because it is We, the People who Tulsi is running to serve. Now we’re all clear on who really keeps this campaign running (reminder: it’s you), let’s get clear on what we need to do over the coming weeks: Below are the three most important things we can achieve together before the year is out to ensure Tulsi is in the strongest position possible to keep fighting for all of us, and for a more United States of America: What it’ll take to bypass the corporate media blackouts and smears, and keep Tulsi’s message for the people front and center: Speaking truth to power to millions of viewers every month — on the airwaves, on debate stages, online. We’ve qualified for the 200,000 individual donor threshold for the December debate. But it’s not enough to just be on that stage one night a month, we need to make sure Tulsi’s message is heard every day — with a big digital ad spend that delivers Tulsi’s message to phones and screens across the country. = We’ve already seen how the media cannot be relied upon to accurately represent Tulsi, her message or our movement. name: Tina Smith
subject: Bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I just got out of my weekly check-in with our finance team and I have some bad news to share with you. I hope you will take a moment to read this message.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191206-weekly1?refcode=em191206-weekly1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Team --

I just got out of my weekly check-in with our finance team and I have some bad news to share with you:

**We are only a handful of days into December, and _not_ on pace to reach our most important FEC deadline of the year.**

I'm a little worried because our race is a top target for my opponent Jason Lewis, Mitch McConnell, and their billionaire buddies who will spend whatever it takes to defeat me.

If our campaign doesn't post the strongest numbers possible, then I'm afraid Republican mega-donors and right-wing groups will think Minnesota is ripe for the taking.

That's why it's so important we hit these goals every single week through the end of the year. To compete with that kind of GOP cash, we need a surge of grassroots contributions from folks like you. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to donate toward our weekly goal of raising $20,000 before midnight on Sunday and helping us stay on track for our biggest FEC deadline yet? I wouldn't ask if it wasn't so important.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191206-weekly1?refcode=em191206-weekly1&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

-- Tina

But Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have refused to even take them up for a vote. We will not make progress on climate action without a Democratic Senate.

[That's why we're asking for your help. We need to raise $50,000 before the holidays begin. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name if you're all in to empower part-time workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Today, as corporations rake in larger and larger profits, a full time minimum wage job cannot keep a mother and her child out of poverty. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a15/1504643025/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Working families across the country are getting crushed.

Today, as corporations rake in larger and larger profits, a full time minimum wage job cannot keep a mother and her child out of poverty. Right now, a parent working a full time minimum wage job can't afford a two bedroom apartment in any county in this country.

That's why back in October, I proposed the most comprehensive agenda for workers since the New Deal -- using all the tools of the presidency to strengthen the labor movement and put power back into the hands of the people.

But in my travels across the country talking to workers about what matters to them, one issue comes up again and again: too many workers face unpredictable work schedules that leave them with too few hours to make a living wage and no control over their time.

**This week I expanded on my plan to empower and protect workers to make sure all part-time workers have agency over their own schedules and are able to provide for their families.**

**[Add your name today if you support my Fair Workweek Plan to empower part-time workers:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a14/1504643025/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0wNVBfUkxUX0xBQl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-fair-workweek?source=EMM05P_RLT_LAB_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a14/1504643025/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0wNVBfUkxUX0xBQl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-fair-workweek?source=EMM05P_RLT_LAB_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

Over the last decade, many employers have adopted "just in time" scheduling practices that assign workers hours in real time. In some cases, work assignments change by the hour, based on factors like customer demand, the time of day, the time of year, or even the weather. And workers of color -- especially women of color -- bear the brunt of these abusive scheduling practices.

**That ends in a Warren Administration**. My Fair Workweek Plan will put power in the hands of part-time workers and help them control their schedules. It will:

* **Require employers with 15 or more employees to give two weeks of advance notice of work schedules.** Employees in the retail, food service, cleaning, hospitality, and warehouse industries will get their work schedules at least two weeks in advance so that they can plan their lives, will have the right to decline work hours not listed, and will be compensated for changes within that window.

* **Empower employees to ask for schedules that work for them without fear of retaliation.** Employees shouldn't lose their jobs or get their hours cut for asking for fair schedules. Under my plan, employers that employ more than 15 workers will be required to take into account their workers' scheduling requests and provide a justification if they can't accommodate a request. If employees ask to change their schedule to accommodate caregiving, education or training, or a second job, their employer will have to accommodate them unless they have a legitimate business reason for denying the request.

* **Ensure a right to rest between shifts.** Too often, workers are forced to work the closing shift one day and the opening shift the next, leaving too little time to rest or take care of obligations outside work. My plan would give workers who work at companies with more than 15 employees the rest they desperately need by guaranteeing workers 11 hours between shifts and compensating them with higher pay for hours voluntarily worked within that window.

* **Require employers to offer additional work hours to existing, qualified, part-time workers before hiring new employees or contractors.** Hiring more part-time workers is how giant companies try to squeeze out profits off of the backs of workers by not paying for benefits. My plan requires employers with more than 500 employees to ask their workers how many hours they want to work and when they're available, offer additional work to qualified existing part-time workers before hiring new workers or contractors, and compensate their existing workers for the additional hours.

* **Provide benefits to part-time workers.** Under my plan, workers who have worked for their employer for at least 12 months will have access to Family Medical Leave Act leave and protection whether they are part time or full time. Workers who work at least 500 hours for two consecutive years will also have access to employee retirement plans.

My Fair Workweek plan will help shift power back to part-time workers -- helping up to 27 million Americans and producing the kind of big, structural change we need. **But I can't do it without you.**

**Together, we can shift the balance of power from corporations to the hands of workers, but it's going to take a grassroots movement to make it happen.**

**[Add your name today if you're all in to empower part-time workers through my Fair Workweek Plan.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a14/1504643025/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0wNVBfUkxUX0xBQl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-fair-workweek?source=EMM05P_RLT_LAB_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a14/1504643025/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0wNVBfUkxUX0xBQl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-fair-workweek?source=EMM05P_RLT_LAB_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

**Elizabeth doesn't accept contributions from PACs of any kind or federally registered lobbyists. This grassroots movement is powered by supporters like you. Chip in now to help build our movement.**

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a17/1504643025/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTA1UF9STFRfTEFCX0VfMjAxOTEyMDZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM05P_RLT_LAB_E_20191206_V1S1_P")
---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a16/1504643025/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a19/1504643025/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a18/1504643025/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a1b/1504643025/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a1a/1504643025/VEsHBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b089/45c30650/11c277d0d/66f86a1d/1504643025/VEsHBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: Doing the job Trump hired her to do
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f110f/891649568/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Donald Trump built his administration by putting people in charge of agencies and programs they'd spent their careers trying to dismantle. One of those people was **Seema Verma, a Republican consultant who'd worked with Mike Pence to make Medicaid less effective and more expensive for Indiana residents**. She'd also been at the center of a conflict-of-interest scandal, when folks learned that she was not only consulting on Indiana Medicaid policy, but also working for one of the state's largest Medicaid vendors. **The streamlined version: Verma's qualifications were (1) making it harder for people to get the care they need, and (2) fleecing Medicaid to line her pockets.** So Donald Trump (with the consent of the Senate) put her in charge of Medicaid and Medicare. **[America deserves so much better than Seema Verma, Donald Trump, and the Senate that enables their corruption. That's what our fight's about. Chip in $3 now to keep the movement strong!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f1108/891649568/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-06-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** [Donate Now](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f1108/891649568/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-06-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Since taking office, Verma has sought to slash benefits and shift costs onto sick and low-income people. On her _first day_ , she wrote a letter encouraging states to begin charging Medicaid recipients monthly premiums and emergency room fees. **At the same time she was claiming the government couldn't afford to help poor people access crucial health care, her agency was spending _millions of taxpayer dollars _on public relations consultants to polish Verma's media profile**. And it gets worse: Those PR consultants? They were long-time Republican power players, including a former head of Donald Trump's transition team. **The streamlined version: Verma has spent her government tenure (1) making it harder for people to afford the care they need, and (2) fleecing the Department of Health and Human services to line her cronies' pockets.** **[Donate $3 today to take back the Senate and end the Trump administration's corruption.](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f1108/891649568/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-06-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** In a sense, Verma is doing the job Trump hired her to do; **incompetence, cronyism, and shady self-dealing are core values of his administration.** They're counting on making us cynical, on driving the public to write off our government as hopelessly corrupt, on stonewalling our efforts to hold them accountable. Not. Going. To. Happen. This campaign is about building a new politics that people can be proud of. That starts with the knowledge that government should confront the problems of working people, not fill the coffers of the president and his pals. **The streamlined version: We've got a true grassroots movement and an unshakeable belief in democracy and the work ethic to take back the Senate.** **[Stand with us! Contribute $3 now to keep the pressure on!](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f1108/891649568/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-12-06-verma&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** _Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f1109/891649568/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-12-06-verma&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f110a/891649568/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-12-06-verma&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f110b/891649568/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-12-06-verma&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390975/55b66746/2d57a2b8/80f1114/891649568/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-12-06-verma&refcode2=express-buttons")

subject: One click
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
We've got a one-click question for you:

| [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d922/7dfbb003/42af6419/5527bcc4/52440637/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&source=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey")
---
Friend,

The news is official: North Carolina courts are allowing the new congressional maps to stand.

**Our vision is still clear: Monika is running to serve North Carolina's 2nd District with integrity and intention.**

She is ready to work hard, listen, and stay committed to the people who live here. For decades, she has fought for women and survivors of sexual and domestic assault. It's time we had someone like Monika in Congress!

With the maps finalized, we have just a quick question for you: **Do you want your next congressional representative to serve with integrity?** | | [YES! »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d922/7dfbb003/42af6419/5527bcc5/52440637/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress-survey?refcode=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&refcode2=yes&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=2+-+YES+raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&source=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey")
---
| | [NO »](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d922/7dfbb003/42af6419/5527bcba/52440637/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress-survey?refcode=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&refcode2=no&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=3+-+NO+raquo&utm_campaign=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&source=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey")
---
Thank you,

Team Monika
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. As the District 2 member of the Wake County school board and Executive Director of North Carolina's Coalition Against Sexual Assault, Monika knows how to lead with solutions. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. [CONTRIBUTE](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d922/7dfbb003/42af6419/5527bcbb/52440637/VEsC/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&utm_medium=email&utm_source=monika&utm_content=4+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey&source=rtw_20191206_em_clicksurvey")
---

PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS

Monika for Congress
PO BOX 99092
Raleigh, NC 27624
United States

| | Peter, I want to tell you why **[I'm asking you for $1 today.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489092e/7f51f7bc/4bb1fdc0/4ef0f47b/2757887897/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-grassrootsdollardrive?refcode=email_20191206.1nd__592__&amount=1&recurring=true")**

My opponent has nearly $11 million to spend on this race. We're building a different kind of campaign here -- one that relies on the many, not the money. But "the many" means that **I need every single person reading this to throw in what you can -- even if it's just $1.** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489092e/7f51f7bc/4bb1fdc0/4ef0f47b/2757887897/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU5MiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-grassrootsdollardrive?refcode=email_20191206.1nd__592__&amount=1&recurring=true")
---
A dollar is more than just a dollar in this case. Your donation will be combined with thousands of others from across Texas and the country to support our ever-growing operation, allow me to travel across the state, and pay for ads to spread our message.

**Tomorrow my team will let me know how many people were able to give $1 to help this campaign keep going.** I'm hoping to see a number that reflects the real enthusiasm I know this team has to win this race. Peter -- I'm hoping I can count on you.

**Can you pitch in $1 or more toward our Grassroots Dollar Drive? Your support _will_ make a difference.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: President Trump just asked Brett Kavanaugh to block a House subpoena for his financial documents.
body:
Brett Kavanaugh.

[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa9/4bef7a87/6a69b9ae/287fe5f0/4090315381/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191206-2-full")
Friends,
President Trump just called in a favor to his hand-picked justices, Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch.
**He wants them to block a House request for his financial documents.**
Susan Collins voted to confirm BOTH of these far-right judges - and she cast a deciding vote to put Kavanaugh on the Court. She's just another vote for Trump's agenda in the Senate and it's time to replace her with someone who will fight for Maine.
[**Make a $3 contribution to help us defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Mainers before Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa9/4bef7a87/6a69b9ae/287fe5f0/4090315381/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191206-2-full")
Susan Collins proved that she's willing to help Trump stack the Supreme Court with far-right judges who will do his bidding. We can't put her in a position to do it again, so let's give Sara's race everything we've got.
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802fa9/4bef7a87/6a69b9ae/287fe5f0/4090315381/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191206-2-full")******

* * *

South Freeport, ME 04078

clean_body: Brett Kavanaugh. "" Friends, President Trump just called in a favor to his hand-picked justices, Brett Kavanaugh and Neil Gorsuch. He wants them to block a House request for his financial documents. Susan Collins voted to confirm BOTH of these far-right judges - and she cast a deciding vote to put Kavanaugh on the Court. She's just another vote for Trump's agenda in the Senate and it's time to replace her with someone who will fight for Maine. "" Susan Collins proved that she's willing to help Trump stack the Supreme Court with far-right judges who will do his bidding. We can't put her in a position to do it again, so let's give Sara's race everything we've got. \- Team Sara **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Tom Steyer
subject: Striking today for climate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TOM STEYER 2020]()
body:
| | | |
---
---
This is how we win, friend. Right now, young people all across the world are taking the lead on the climate crisis by walking outside and saying, “no more.” I am so inspired by their courage — they’re taking action while the world’s politicians bend to the will of corporations destroying our planet. But young people shouldn’t have to carry the mantle of their future alone. [_**Today, let’s stand with them and pledge to do more.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUI2bfakRsSH4l5mStCDwiORLRLaRdUKjDdualYZpdbH3yxSPyxJberWvn1r-2F2t2fDkgzzLkyF6tp8PKtySBVd3N3P3PrI6N57ureTGiREPrsp1Pt3eifoqyAsmK9e4HO1cAC52I-2BnBVzRnm7v67JW2sDxrkcBCy-2BcT3DqVPUGWvIL5Bl1FHEmOPvsx-2BXUFENQ-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfJSvWLQmdjkL5xDmLZV3Pf79zE7KtVW7Kc-2BqWlA7O4p0Gmw0JRScbdimo4cMm6HC0GSSD7vpUBBslWor9fyU4cjbCNkcA3SjDtzRUDQ-2FvmvgjXjh-2FhNni6KCZNt-2FnrkwY6Fn0z3TKGjjsNYq93PfBLcgTqNFeH-2Fs1Tux-2B5PWATfymFT-2BDeW3x3W50QMuLrAdSEnz-2FW-2BKErcQgfydXiMtXe6YvDqMOnQNVxTcmxmrjgFEvGNSrRq5vWndy5U2tlYmoQfTS2mcDxXZRh1JWuA-2BLMqiRufbYKlSH34kQy6qgjpsdOzW8F2oLEjBZxQqLC28tAlpbtvOey6uGLtGV5wiia12N1PPCdXzeMjvYm-2FGtRsw-3D-3D) We have the power to show our government — and the corporations that have bought it — that we’re not afraid of them, and that we won’t stay silent in the face of their inaction. Let’s continue the fight by keeping climate at the forefront of the political conversation. **This isn’t just about the future any more. If we’re going to have a chance at slowing down the damage that’s already being done, we need to act now. And it will take all of us. Every day. Every hour. Right now.** [_**Add your name to stand for our planet, and then find a climate strike near you to raise your voice.**_](http://clicks.tomsteyer.com/wf/click?upn=cBSXlkRq21E9V5onLqLCBguGO1iUd2XLcKbWoq181-2BUI2bfakRsSH4l5mStCDwiORLRLaRdUKjDdualYZpdbH3yxSPyxJberWvn1r-2F2t2fDkgzzLkyF6tp8PKtySBVd3N3P3PrI6N57ureTGiREPrsp1Pt3eifoqyAsmK9e4HO1cAC52I-2BnBVzRnm7v67JW2sDxrkcBCy-2BcT3DqVPUGWvIL5Bl1FHEmOPvsx-2BXUFENQ-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFCgEVvHZJIBnVwrwztgYJz4eFq9BMkyZwT1fV8gU3hTKgydBXEIdOTn-2BDH-2Bd74DFfJSvWLQmdjkL5xDmLZV3Pf79zE7KtVW7Kc-2BqWlA7O4p0Gmw0JRScbdimo4cMm6HC0GSSD7vpUBBslWor9fyU4cjbCNkcA3SjDtzRUDQ-2FvmvgjXjh-2FhNni6KCZNt-2Fnrkwb2jmKu9rjS3Ipb5UnZLdgtS1ui0I1O9f0piPzaEGuvclxNhdaizLd1oFDS3mYt8FWeezNYume-2FRIXDBXA844wSqoCwZuHh-2BbS4Hx5uWDyoGdIXn3EsHAhc5VqPjhzB10nD2Y6gXcROpBpICDxksuHSw4fWgp5ozEzJ4iS9ebRpqM3ZdhZXXLtzbRwIBqSbWK0I4wvc1JXp0O6qxyZRuUoVSB3memhRTBFFTvPEmQjdUQ-3D-3D) There’s power in numbers, friend, and we have the numbers. Onward,
Tom

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: Trump's hunger strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | To get into the holiday spirit, Trump is taking food off the table for 700,000 Americans by ending their SNAP benefits.
**More than 40 million people are food insecure in America.** I know what it's like to have to rely on support from the community to get by. Making people go hungry while giving tax cuts to billionaires and corporations is wrong. Let's be clear: when it comes to Trump, cruelty is the strategy. **This inhumanity must end.** Above all: Food is a human right. No one in America should be going hungry. That's why I won't just defend SNAP. I'll expand it. I'm the only candidate with a plan to end hunger, and I refuse to leave our most vulnerable behind. [Join me >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc891/3eb3e2fc/6883a6b1/744d0d87/2319443649/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc891/3eb3e2fc/6883a6b1/744d0d8d/2319443649/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=11+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b3_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc891/3eb3e2fc/6883a6b1/744d0d8c/2319443649/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+here&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b3_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc891/3eb3e2fc/6883a6b1/744d0d8b/2319443649/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b3_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b3_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

clean_body: | | | | | | | To get into the holiday spirit, Trump is taking food off the table for 700,000 Americans by ending their SNAP benefits. More than 40 million people are food insecure in America. I know what it's like to have to rely on support from the community to get by. Making people go hungry while giving tax cuts to billionaires and corporations is wrong. Let's be clear: when it comes to Trump, cruelty is the strategy. This inhumanity must end. Above all: Food is a human right. No one in America should be going hungry. That's why I won't just defend SNAP. I'll expand it. I'm the only candidate with a plan to end hunger, and I refuse to leave our most vulnerable behind. "" "" "" "" "" "" "" \- Julian | | | | | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | julianforthefuture.com | | Paid for by Julian for the Future | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible. name: Ed Markey
subject: I'm asking you to stand with us in solidarity. Will you add your name to say you're in this fight and demand that we act on climate before it is too late?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Climate change is here, and we're in the fight for our lives. | |
---
| Friends -

Climate change is here, and we're in the fight for our lives.

In September, thousands of young activists walked out of their classrooms and took to the streets to demand climate action.

It was an inspiring, powerful, and necessary moment as we continue to face the greatest challenge to our planet.

That's why we're striking once again today. I joined activists across Massachusetts for today's climate strike.

[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df19/693b8b0a/43baa081/72de7d47/2952947354/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191206-full")
We rallied at Copley Square in Boston to take a stand and demand action on the Green New Deal.

**[I'm asking you to stand with us in solidarity. Will you add your name to say you're in this fight and demand that we act on climate before it is too late?](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df19/693b8b0a/43baa081/72de7d47/2952947354/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191206-full")**

This is not a moment. It's a movement.

[](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df19/693b8b0a/43baa081/72de7d47/2952947354/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191206-full")
But we cannot wait any longer. Climate change is here and taking its toll. The planet has a fever, and there are no emergency rooms for planets.

**[Add your name right now to join us in demanding action on climate change. Together, we can pass the Green New Deal and save our planet.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df19/693b8b0a/43baa081/72de7d47/2952947354/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191206-full")**

I'm so grateful to the young people who are bringing the activism and energy we need on this issue.

It's going to take all of us to win this fight, so thank you for adding your voice with ours.

\- Ed **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df19/693b8b0a/43baa081/72de7d47/2952947354/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMDYtZnVsbCJ9/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/stand-with-climate-strikers?source=em191206-full")**

---

---

[http://www.edmarkey.com](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df19/693b8b0a/43baa081/72de7d45/2952947354/VEsB/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "http://www.edmarkey.com")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Renee=20Unterman?=
subject: Campaign Newsletter, 12/6/19
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Greetings from the campaign trail!

It was a busy week around Forsyth and Gwinnett Counties. I attended the Gwinnett pre-assembly breakfast to discuss upcoming priorities for the 2020 legislative session. We heard from Gwinnett County Schools, County Commissioner Nash, Gwinnett Tech, and many more. I look forward to fighting for my constituents in the upcoming session!
---
|
---
| Next, I was humbled to attend a Candlelight Vigil for those who have been lost to homicide. This annual event holds a special place in my heart, and I am truly inspired by our community coming together to honor the memories of loved ones. I am thankful for District Attorney Danny Porter and his prosecutors, the victim assistance staff, and all of the law enforcement officials that continue to seek justice for victims in our community.
---
|
---
| Finally, I ended the week by having lunch with friends at the City of Suwanee’s Holiday Luncheon! Great food and fellowship were the perfect way to get ready for the Holiday season!
---
|
---
| Our grassroots campaign relies on the support of Georgians like YOU, and I cannot do this without your help. **I am asking my top supporters to please do the following:**
1. **Donate **[online](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=47bd6b8e97&e=c1dbff800f) – any amount helps!
2. **Like** our [Facebook](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=e43e628be3&e=c1dbff800f) page, and follow me on [Twitter](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=8b1f656b70&e=c1dbff800f) and [Instagram](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=07de254107&e=c1dbff800f).
3. **Share** campaign social media posts online with your friends and family.
4. [**Visit**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=4f011ff28f&e=c1dbff800f) my website and **[volunteer](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=fc4851a874&e=c1dbff800f)** to make phone calls, canvass your neighborhood, host a meet & greet, or join me for an upcoming event!

---
| Thank you so much for your support in this journey.

Until next week!

-Renee

clean_body: | | | | | | Greetings from the campaign trail! It was a busy week around Forsyth and Gwinnett Counties. I attended the Gwinnett pre-assembly breakfast to discuss upcoming priorities for the 2020 legislative session. We heard from Gwinnett County Schools, County Commissioner Nash, Gwinnett Tech, and many more. I look forward to fighting for my constituents in the upcoming session! | | Next, I was humbled to attend a Candlelight Vigil for those who have been lost to homicide. This annual event holds a special place in my heart, and I am truly inspired by our community coming together to honor the memories of loved ones. I am thankful for District Attorney Danny Porter and his prosecutors, the victim assistance staff, and all of the law enforcement officials that continue to seek justice for victims in our community. | | Finally, I ended the week by having lunch with friends at the City of Suwanee’s Holiday Luncheon! Great food and fellowship were the perfect way to get ready for the Holiday season! | | Our grassroots campaign relies on the support of Georgians like YOU, and I cannot do this without your help. I am asking my top supporters to please do the following: 1. Donate – any amount helps! 2. Like our page, and follow me on and . 3. Share campaign social media posts online with your friends and family. 4. my website and to make phone calls, canvass your neighborhood, host a meet & greet, or join me for an upcoming event! | Thank you so much for your support in this journey. Until next week! -Renee | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2019 Unterman for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: The guy behind Trump's children-in-cages policy.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c442/6cd27893/52dfb17a/1587a257/1610641872/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Have you heard of Stephen Miller? He is a top policy advisor to Donald Trump, first on the campaign and now in the White House. He was the architect of the **Muslim ban**. He pushed to **rescind the DACA ****program** for immigrants brought here by their parents. He reportedly convinced the president to **shut down the government** to try and force funding for a **border wall**. And perhaps worst of all, he helped create the **cruel family separation policy** that tears migrant children from their parents' arms and locks them in cages. **And now, no surprise, we have learned that he pressured conservative media to print racist conspiracy theories, and aggressively stoked white supremacist anger to help get Trump elected.** He has to go. We are building a movement to say with one loud voice: Stephen Miller has no place in the White House. [**Sign the petition. Stephen Miller must resign right now.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c442/6cd27893/52dfb17a/1587a254/1610641872/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Nancy Pelosi: "Are you ready?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, In a closed-door meeting with Democratic lawmakers to discuss the next steps of the impeachment inquiry, Nancy Pelosi asked a simple question: "Are you ready?" Now we're asking you: Are you ready to impeach Donald Trump? Are you ready to vote the GOP out of Congress in 2020? Are you ready to restore democracy, decency, and good governance to America? **Are you ready?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb5/6e9863e8/16e786e8/1db0bb5b/1575642174/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/k--2i17p") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb5/6e9863e8/16e786e8/1db0bb5b/1575642174/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/k--2i17p") Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdcb5/6e9863e8/16e786e8/1db0bb58/1575642174/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191206c.ND&refcode2=2TNGWCIJhkoXBn9mPjLc")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five Stories President Trump Doesn’t Want you to Miss
body:
Jobs Growth Soars in November as Payrolls Surge by 266,000 | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=86cba6337a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**Jobs Growth Soars in November as Payrolls Surge by 266,000**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=da1da41282&e=3ee4985eea)
-CNBC
“The jobs market turned in a stellar performance in November, with nonfarm payrolls surging by 266,000 and the unemployment rate falling to 3.5%”—matching its best rate in 50 years. “Those totals easily beat the Wall Street consensus,” Jeff Cox reports. “Bottom line, America is working,” National Economic Council Director Larry Kudlow said.
---
|
---
| [**Pelosi Again Exposes Impeachment as Just a Cynical Political Show**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eada905e55&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Speaker Nancy Pelosi stepped out from behind the curtain Thursday to order up articles of impeachment against President Trump — once again exposing the official process as merely a show. Her approach has been cavalier from the start . . . And it’s only gotten worse,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| [**Trump and First Lady Light the National Christmas Tree in Washington, D.C.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=490b98c27c&e=3ee4985eea)
-CBS News
President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump “lit the National Christmas Tree on Thursday night at the Ellipse in President's Park in front of the White House. Those interested in catching a glimpse of the tree — adorned with 50,000 lights and 450 giant white star ornaments — have until January 1,” Audrey McNamara reports.

**🎬** **Watch:** [The First Lady unveils the White House Christmas decorations!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=131853c85d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Adam Schiff Is Watching**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a94b053734&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“In his rush to paint Donald Trump as a lawbreaker, Mr. Schiff has himself trampled law and responsibility,” Kimberly Strassel writes. Schiff displayed a stunning abuse of power by obtaining the phone records of political rivals. “Imagine a world in which congressional partisans routinely track and expose the call lists of their political rivals and disfavored media.”

**This is journalism?** [WaPo wants ‘undecided Americans’ to support impeachment](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=edf83ce0ed&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump’s NATO Successes**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1834b03308&e=3ee4985eea)
-_National Review_
With the 2019 NATO Summit this past week, President Trump can reflect on the fact that when he assumed office, only three NATO countries apart from the U.S. “were meeting the agreed target of devoting 2 percent of GDP to defense: the United Kingdom, Poland, and mighty Estonia. Today that number is eight, and commitments are in place to take it up to 18 out of 30 within four years,” Conrad Black writes.

**🎬** [President Trump put Americans first at the London NATO Summit](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1a974c9d27&e=3ee4985eea)

Her approach has been cavalier from the start . . . And it’s only gotten worse,” the New York Post editorial board writes. | | -CBS News President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump “lit the National Christmas Tree on Thursday night at the Ellipse in President's Park in front of the White House. Those interested in catching a glimpse of the tree — adorned with 50,000 lights and 450 giant white star ornaments — have until January 1,” Audrey McNamara reports. 🎬 Watch: | | -The Wall Street Journal “In his rush to paint Donald Trump as a lawbreaker, Mr. Schiff has himself trampled law and responsibility,” Kimberly Strassel writes. Schiff displayed a stunning abuse of power by obtaining the phone records of political rivals. “Imagine a world in which congressional partisans routinely track and expose the call lists of their political rivals and disfavored media.” This is journalism? | | -National Review With the 2019 NATO Summit this past week, President Trump can reflect on the fact that when he assumed office, only three NATO countries apart from the U.S. “were meeting the agreed target of devoting 2 percent of GDP to defense: the United Kingdom, Poland, and mighty Estonia. Today that number is eight, and commitments are in place to take it up to 18 out of 30 within four years,” Conrad Black writes. 🎬 | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The Youth Climate Strike
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
I am in solidarity with strikers across the country today because what they're doing is powerfully important. They understand that the climate crisis is an existential threat to humanity, and it's... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b087/45c30650/11c2ec2b1/66f81557/3336704417/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Today, young people all over the world took part in the Youth Climate Strike.

I stand in solidarity with strikers across the country and around the world because we must fight for the clean future we all deserve. The climate crisis is the existential threat of our time, and it's going to take nothing less than a grassroots movement to defeat it.

We're already seeing the effects of the climate crisis devastate communities across America -- in the disastrous floods, horrific wildfires, and record-breaking storms that happen every year.

**And it's time to fight back.**

Instead of protecting big fossil fuel companies and the corruption in Washington that's led us to this moment, we need bold leadership.

Together, we're going to fight for a Green New Deal, transition our economy to 100% clean energy, and create millions of good jobs in the process. **But I need you in this fight -- and we all need to do our part to defeat the climate crisis.**

**[Add your name if you're committed to our plan to take action to fight climate change:](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b087/45c30650/11c2ec2b1/66f81559/3336704417/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0yMlBfRUdSX0VOVl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-youth-climate-strike?source=EMM22P_EGR_ENV_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

| [**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b087/45c30650/11c2ec2b1/66f81559/3336704417/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0yMlBfRUdSX0VOVl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-youth-climate-strike?source=EMM22P_EGR_ENV_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---

The time for small ideas is over.

Fossil fuel companies have had a stranglehold on our government for far too long. Decades of corruption have devastated the planet, and no amount of nibbling around the edges or making small tweaks is going to fix it. **It's going to take a mass movement. It's going to take big, structural change.

Our commitment to fighting climate change is a commitment to a better future for the working people of our country. And it starts with a real commitment from the person sitting in the White House: I will fight for your job, your family, and your community like I would my own.**

I believe that we can aggressively reduce greenhouse emissions here at home and lead the way for the rest of the world. I believe that working people will be the driving force in the fight against climate change -- but we've got to do everything in our power to back them up.

**[Add your name today if you're in this fight with the millions of climate strikers leading this movement for change.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b087/45c30650/11c2ec2b1/66f81559/3336704417/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0yMlBfRUdSX0VOVl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-youth-climate-strike?source=EMM22P_EGR_ENV_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth Warren

[**ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852b087/45c30650/11c2ec2b1/66f81559/3336704417/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTU0yMlBfRUdSX0VOVl9FXzIwMTkxMjA2X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-youth-climate-strike?source=EMM22P_EGR_ENV_E_20191206_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Juli=C3=A1n_Castro?=
subject: we call ourselves progressives
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | **‪If we want to call ourselves progressives, we can 't be afraid to have real values.‬**
‪Since day one, I've been in this race to fight for people at the margins--the poor, hungry and homeless, POC and queer people, young people and those with disabilities.‬ ‪I've elevated issues that presidential candidates frequently won't touch--police violence, just treatment for immigrants, hunger and rural poverty.‬ **I care about these issues because I grew up seeing how they impacted my community.** ‪Running an honest campaign, one not dictated by consultants and opinion polls, isn't the easy option. ‪[But it's worth it to know that every one of our supporters is here because they are ready to fight for our real shared values.‬ >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc892/3eb3e2fc/6889b42d/744d0c62/1380349646/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=1+-+But+itrsquos+worth+it+to+know+that+every&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all") ‪Whether you've been a long time supporter or you're looking at our campaign for the first time, thank you.‬ **‪I 'm in this for the long haul, dedicated to keep speaking truth to power, fighting for people who are too often forgotten.** [I hope you'll stick with me and continue to support our campaign putting People First. >>](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc892/3eb3e2fc/6889b42d/744d0c61/1380349646/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=2+-+I+hope+yoursquoll+stick+with+me+and+cont&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all") In solidarity,
Julian

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc892/3eb3e2fc/6889b42d/744d0c6d/1380349646/VEsA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=6+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc892/3eb3e2fc/6889b42d/744d0c6c/1380349646/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc892/3eb3e2fc/6889b42d/744d0c6b/1380349646/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all&source=20191206_em_fr_b4_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: As 2019 comes to a close
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight PAC, www
body:
2019 is coming to a close and we need your help starting 2020 strong. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b0/34a064cc/1b17ff4b/703603d/886700917/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - This year was monumental for the fight to protect voting rights. We launched Fair Fight 2020, an unprecedented effort to support and fund voter protection programs in 20 battleground states across the country. And at the 5th Democratic debate here in Georgia, we saw the issue of voting rights take center stage. **But despite the progress we 've made, new legislation is popping up across the country that threatens eligible voters' right to have their ballot cast and counted in the very states that could define the 2020 election.** Our last fundraising deadline of the year is coming up soon, and we want to enter the 2020 election cycle with everything we need to fight back against attempts to suppress the vote. So we've set a BIG goal of reaching $2 million raised online before the end of the year so we can build the grassroots movement it takes to guarantee every voter a Fair Fight. [**Can we count on you to make a contribution to help us fully scale voter protection teams in states across America so that every eligible voter can access the ballot?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b0/34a064cc/1b17ff4b/703603a/886700917/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjA2MTlFT1ktMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE120619EOY-1-a") **[DONATE](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa5b0/34a064cc/1b17ff4b/703603a/886700917/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiSUUxMjA2MTlFT1ktMS1hIn0%3D/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fairfight-2019?refcode=IE120619EOY-1-a")** Your donation, no matter the amount, will go a long way towards protecting voting rights for Americans across the country.
